zh.lifeSummary: Gillyen Julien Ann Morris是Morris的女兒，於1616年出生在英國英格蘭戴文武爾。她於1641年與Henry Lamprey在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1670年5月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gillyen Julien Ann Morris是Morris的女儿，于1616年出生在英国英格兰戴文武爾。她于1641年与Henry Lamprey在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1670年5月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Morris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Mauritz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Armin, Frieda, Helmut, Kurt, Reinhold, Wolfgang.
German and Dutch: from the personal name Mauritz, from Latin Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: Mauricio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Mario, Roberto, Lilia, Luis, Adela, Andres, Antero, Cipriano.  Portuguese Manoel.
Portuguese (Maurício) and Spanish: from the personal name Maurício (Portuguese), Mauricio (Spanish), derived from the Latin name Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: Maurice
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Armand, Denys, Gabrielle, Antoine, Benoit, Camille, Cecile, Francois, Gaston, Germain.
French, English, Welsh, Scottish, and Irish: from the Old French personal name Maurice, Latin Mauritius (see Morris ).

variants.name: McMorris
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muiris, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of Morris . In some cases this is a Gaelicized form of Fitzmaurice .
Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muirgheasa ‘son of Muirgheas’, a Gaelic personal name meaning ‘sea valor’ or ‘sea choice’. Compare Morrissey .

variants.name: Morici
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Gasper, Aldo, Angelo, Annamarie, Elvio, Giuseppe, Sal, Santo, Vito.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a variant of the personal name Maurice (see Morris ).
Hungarian: patronymic from the personal name Móric, Hungarian form of Morris .

variants.name: Moris
meanings: English: variant of   Morris  .

French, Luxembourgish, Flemish, Walloon, North German, and Dutch: from a vernacular form of the French personal name Maurice (see Morris ). In North America, the surname Moris may also be an altered form of French Maurice .
Americanized form of German   Moritz  .

variants.name: Merrick
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Meuric, the Middle Welsh form of Maurice (see Morris ).
Irish: borrowed from Welsh. In Ireland, when this is not the Welsh name, it might be adopted for Irish Ó Mearadhaigh, see Merry 2.

variants.name: Maurizio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Marcello, Marco, Mario, Fernando, Matteo, Natale, Sal, Valentino, Vito.
Italian: from the personal name Maurizio, from Latin Mauritius (see Morris 1).

variants.name: Morehouse
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from any of the many places called Moorhouse in Yorkshire or Durham (from Old English mōr ‘moor’ + hūs ‘house’). In some cases the surname may have become Morris . This name is also established in Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Gillyen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Sligo and Antrim): variant of   Gillan   or a shortened form of   McGillen  .
German: variant of   Gilbert  . See also   Gille   2.

variants.name: Gillan
meanings: Variant of   Julian  , from which it was differentiated in spelling only in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Julien
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Julian  , now also found in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: Gillyen Julien Ann Morris was born in 1616, in Uffculme, Devon, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Morris. She married Henry Lamprey in 1641, in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 10 May 1670, in Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Gillyen Julien Ann Morris est née en 1616, à Uffculme, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Morris. Elle a épousé Henry Lamprey en 1641, à Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 mai 1670, à Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 54 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Gillyen Julien Ann Morris è nata il nel 1616 nel Uffculme, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Morris. Lei sposato Henry Lamprey nel 1641, nel Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 maggio 1670, nel Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gillyen Julien Ann Morrisは1616年にイギリスイギリスデボンウフクウルメでMorrisの娘として生まれた。1641年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーボストンでHenry Lampreyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1670年5月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクハンプトンで54歳で死去した。

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Gillyen Julien Ann Morris(은)는 1616년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 프컬에서 Morris의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1641년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴에서 Henry Lamprey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1670년 5월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 함프턴에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gillyen Julien Ann Morris nasceu em 1616, em Uffculme, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Morris. Ela casou-se com Henry Lamprey em 1641, em Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de maio de 1670, em Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Gillyen Julien Ann Morris родилась в 1616 г. в местности уффкулм, девон, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Morris. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Lamprey в 1641 г. в местности бостон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 мая 1670 г. в местности хамптон, норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Gillyen Julien Ann Morris nació en 1616, en Uffculme, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Morris. Se casó con Henry Lamprey en 1641, en Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1670, en Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 54 años.
